name: @nodetool/websocket
description: Unified websocket runner for workflow and chat operations

scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace @nodetool/protocol && npm run build --workspace @nodetool/runtime && npm run build --workspace @nodetool/kernel && npm run build --workspace @nodetool/node-sdk && npm run build --workspace @nodetool/base-nodes && npm run build --workspace @nodetool/models && npm run build
